flat spreading rim with raised ogee edge; low spreading base; 5 drainage holes, stopped with cement. Light grey porcellanous stoneware burnt redbrown where exposed. Thick glaze, pitted, olive brown with light blue and purple fleckings where thickened and vertical f lecking on each lobe; deep brown on outer edge of rim. Greenish at footrim, stooping just short of rim and within foot. None on base of foot-rim.
